channels._notes: Slow-burn horror anthology. Each 7-episode series is a standalone story.
Near-future science fiction. Hard sci-fi aesthetics.
Victorian and modern mystery. ATLAS's first production: Victorian Shadows.
Action, fights, heists. Dynamic camera grammar.

horror.lighting: low-key, practical sources only, deep shadows, motivated single-source light
horror.camera_grammar: dutch angles for dread, slow push-ins on faces, static wide holds for isolation
horror.color_palette: desaturated cold, deep blue shadows, amber practical sources, no warm fill
horror.pacing: slow burn with sharp cuts at scare beats, hold on reaction
horror.axis_break_policy: allowed at scare moments for disorientation
horror.negative_prompt_additions: bright cheerful lighting, warm color grade, shallow depth of field except extreme close-ups
horror.nano_prompt_prefix: HORROR ATMOSPHERE. Low-key lighting, deep shadows, practical sources. Cold desaturated color.
horror.sound_design_notes: silence punctuated by sudden audio, low-frequency dread tone

sci_fi.lighting: high-tech practical: LED strips, holographic sources, hard directional light
sci_fi.camera_grammar: clean geometry, motivated dolly moves, eye-level for authority, low-angle for machines
sci_fi.color_palette: cool blues and teals, occasional warm amber accents, high contrast
sci_fi.pacing: brisk cuts in action, deliberate holds on technology reveals
sci_fi.axis_break_policy: strict 180 degree rule — this world has order
sci_fi.negative_prompt_additions: warm candlelight, organic textures, period costumes
sci_fi.nano_prompt_prefix: SCI-FI ENVIRONMENT. Clean geometric architecture, cool LED lighting, high-tech surfaces.
sci_fi.sound_design_notes: ambient hum, digital beeps, processed voices

whodunnit_drama.lighting: motivated naturalistic: window light, fireplace, practical lamps, soft fill only
whodunnit_drama.camera_grammar: slow deliberate moves, favors OTS dialogue pairs, close-ups on hands and objects
whodunnit_drama.color_palette: warm amber interiors, cool exterior, desaturated shadows, rich jewel tones
whodunnit_drama.pacing: patient — let scenes breathe, hold on reaction shots
whodunnit_drama.axis_break_policy: strict 180 degree rule — spatial clarity is the mystery
whodunnit_drama.negative_prompt_additions: artificial neon lighting, fast paced editing, sci-fi elements
whodunnit_drama.nano_prompt_prefix: PERIOD DRAMA. Naturalistic lighting, warm interiors, rich textiles and wood.
whodunnit_drama.sound_design_notes: ambient room tone, clock ticks, distant rain, fireplace crackle

action.lighting: high-key when possible, but dynamic: explosions, muzzle flash, dust-filtered sunlight
action.camera_grammar: handheld in fights, motivated crash zooms, low angle on heroes, aerial establishing
action.color_palette: high contrast, crushed blacks, golden hour orange, adrenaline teal
action.pacing: rapid intercutting in action, brief holds after impact
action.axis_break_policy: break axis intentionally during fight choreography for chaos
action.negative_prompt_additions: static talking-head compositions, soft diffused light, leisurely pacing
action.nano_prompt_prefix: ACTION SEQUENCE. Dynamic lighting, high-contrast, kinetic energy.

comedy.lighting: bright even fill, three-point lighting, no harsh shadows, warm friendly tone
comedy.camera_grammar: wide singles for reaction, two-shots for rapport, occasional crash-zoom for gag
comedy.color_palette: warm saturated, bright primaries, clean backgrounds, no darkness
comedy.pacing: tight — no hanging on a joke. Cut on the laugh or just before
comedy.axis_break_policy: 180 degree rule observed except for joke axis breaks
comedy.negative_prompt_additions: dark shadows, horror atmosphere, desaturated grade, dutch angles
comedy.nano_prompt_prefix: BRIGHT COMEDY SETTING. Warm even lighting, clean saturated colors, friendly space.
comedy.sound_design_notes: bright score, room tone, live-audience feel

production_stats._cost_note: Estimate based on: $0.03/nano frame × 100 shots, $0.81/Kling scene × 10 scenes/ep, 15% Wire A regen overhead. Excludes ElevenLabs audio and GCS storage.
